_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: the BCL-XL-selective BH3 mimetic, A1155463, but not ABT-199/Venetoclax, blocked the binding of BCL-XL:BIM (HSBXB)...we observed an absence of HSBXB signal in the -/- Bclxl MEFs
details: Specific binding to BCL-XL:BIM complex, blocked by BCL-XL-selective BH3 mimetic A1155463 but not ABT-199/Venetoclax, and showed absence of signal in Bclxl knockout MEFs
